title: HandoffEvalResult
description: Deterministic quality evaluation of a HandoffContext artifact. Produced by evaluateHandoff() (pure) or evaluateHandoffWithState() (DB-aware). v1.0 adds failure_details with severity, fix_hint, and auto_fixable per issue.

eval_id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation run. Format: eval_<12-char hex>.

evaluated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this evaluation was produced.

score_total.description: Sum of all category scores. Must equal sum of categories[*].score.

score_max.description: Sum of all category max values. Must be 100 for the standard 8-category rubric.

pass_threshold.description: Minimum score_total required to pass. Default: 60.

categories.description: One entry per rubric category. The standard rubric has 8 categories summing to 100.

score.description: Awarded points for this category. Never exceeds max.

max.description: Maximum possible points for this category.

notes.description: Human-readable scoring rationale. One entry per sub-check.

failures.description: Short failure messages (legacy plain-string format). Parallel to failure_details.

recommendations.description: One-line remediation suggestions paired with failures[].

evaluator_mode.description: Evaluation mode used by eval:run. state_aware calls evaluateHandoffWithState() (DB-authoritative, detects missing_policy, missing_project_state, and other state mismatches). pure calls evaluateHandoff() with no DB (artifact text only). Present only in artifacts written by eval:run; absent in artifacts written by rebuild-context-cache (which always uses state_aware internally).

failure_details.description: Rich failure records (v1.0+). Each entry corresponds to one detected issue with machine-readable code, severity, fix_hint, and auto_fixable flag.

code.description: Snake_case machine-readable failure code. Stable across evaluator versions.

message.description: Human-readable description. Same text as the corresponding failures[] entry.

severity.description: critical → next session actively harmed; warning → quality degraded; info → advisory.

fix_hint.description: 1–2 sentence actionable repair instruction. No LLM required — all steps are deterministic CLI commands or structural changes.

auto_fixable.description: True when re-running rebuild-context-cache alone resolves the issue (underlying data already correct in DB). False when human input, approval, or generator changes are required.

state_consistency.description: Present only in HandoffEvalResultV2 (produced by evaluateHandoffWithState). Contains DB-authoritative topic fingerprints and mismatch records.

handoff_topics.description: Per-section fingerprints extracted from the handoff artifact.
